name: CANNAPHARMARX, INC.
summary: CannaPharmaRx, Inc. (CPMD) specializes in the acquisition, development, and operation of cannabis cultivation facilities in Canada. Operating a 55,000 sq ft indoor cannabis farm in Cremona, Alberta with 10 growing rooms, the company produces and sells dried cannabis flower and trim shake. It sells to markets in Germany, Israel, Canada, and Portugal, and is pursuing EU-GMP certification to enable direct EU shipments.

products.name: Dried Cannabis Flower
products.description: Premium and medium batch dried cannabis flower sold to Germany, Israel, Canada, and Portugal markets.

products.name: Trim Shake
products.description: Cannabis trim shake packaged and sold as a secondary cannabis product alongside dried flower.

partnerships.description: Agreement to build EU sales network and access e-commerce technology for online cannabis sales in the EU.
Security and royalty agreement providing financing; Koze holds security interest in Alberta Ltd. subsidiary.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
